objectives.title: Security Level declared (.fusa-iec62443.json with target_sl)
findings: .fusa-iec62443.json not found — run 'gofusa init (create .fusa-iec62443.json with target_sl, component_type)'

objectives.title: Check report present (authorization enforcement evidence)
findings: check-report.json not found — run 'gofusa check --output check-report.json'

objectives.title: Audit log accessible (check-report.json present)
findings: check-report.json not found — run 'gofusa check --output check-report.json'

objectives.title: Vulnerability management policy (SECURITY.md present)
findings: SECURITY.md not found — run 'gofusa — create SECURITY.md documenting the vulnerability disclosure policy'

objectives.title: Software update documentation (provenance.json with builder field)
findings: provenance.json missing builder field — run 'gofusa release' from CI

objectives.title: Security hardening evidence (cyber-report.json present)
findings: cyber-report.json not found — run 'gofusa cyber --output cyber-report.json'

objectives.title: Cyber incident response plan present
findings: INCIDENT-RESPONSE.md not found — run 'gofusa — create INCIDENT-RESPONSE.md or set incident_resp_doc in .fusa-iec62443.json'
